column1: Hey Romario, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
What's up man, it's from March 9-15
Cool I got you. Which destination were you lookin to book?
Word Cancun is dope fs. How many ppl in your group so far?
Yea that's solid! Which school you all from?
Oh fire yea we got a few groups from there rollin with js
Yall def know how to party lol
gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get things booked?
As soon as possible. Thank you
sup Romario! cool will send you this rn. is it cool if I send through email? its a little long for text
dope whats the best email to send to?
just sent that over lmk if you got it
Are there any quotes with flights included
yea we can but its a lot cheaper to get flights separately on your own. wanted to send you the most cost efficient option
which airport we wanna fly out of? ill send a couple options
word I'd get this american airlines flight directly to save money https://www.google.com/travel/flights/s/iDkqC92PAvYe5RZ1A
even cheaper if you leave the 8th https://www.google.com/travel/flights/s/K9tfe6y2YsfDXy278
Can you only give me grand oasis and Krystal or can you also give me the price for RIU Cancun
We can do a Riu Cancun as well. There's a requirement for one person in each room to be 21 for check in. Couple of you 21?
Riu Cancun is $1125 per person for a 3 person room. 5 nights
this is without flight. riu's are generally more expensive
Oh okay, when do u think would be best to book
the sooner the better fs. prices only go up between both the base package and flights
Would he have to do a deposit or how does the payment work
yea so the deposit is $200 per person to secure which gets you all locked in. then the final balance is due two weeks from now
once you choose which you want to do, Ill create your reservation portal and you all hop in there, add details, deposits, etc
Okay thank you. I'll talk to my crew
Hi sorry to bother again. Could you tell me what the price includes
Hey its all good. Do you have the email I sent over? At the very very top lists out all the items included
Yes I just saw it thank you
Just a little long for me to text all of it
hey Romario whats up, how we feelin about those options so far?
What's up man, I think we wanna do grand oasis for 5 nights
bet thats a good choice fs. which airport you want to fly out of? i'll help you find flights
oh true yea forgot I already set you a few
We've been looking at flights and it seems to be cheaper to get a flight on the 9th
word we can do the 9th fs. def less ppl flying that day so will be cheaper
Is it cheaper on the resort if we go on the 8th or same price as 9th
Goodmorning, we're set for the the 5 nights in grand oasis
Good morning, sounds good I'll get that set up right now
8 people, two rooms of 4, March 9-14, cool?
We want to do, 3 rooms. With one of two is that fine
yup no problem. will send that over in 10 minutes with details on how to get secured and deposited
just emailed that over. added step by step on how to get settled on the reservation. let me know if anyone needs help getting on
We have 3 people still waiting on their passports but it asks for it when signing up.
Yea all good skip that for now
Hey Spiffy, we all put the deposit in the 12. When is the latest we can pay for the rest. I know some people in my group need some time but for sure will pay it
hey Romario, how much time did ppl need? we def would like to get the group processed. things are coming quicker than we know it
I say prob towards the end of this week. Idk if you could help out with that
I can get it to the 29th
Hi spiffy, when will we receive information about our rooms?

your rooms are all confirmed. confirmation number is attached to your rooms, we wont know your physical room number until you arrive for check in tho. the hotel desk attendant assigns he physical room based on what they have clean and ready at the time you arrive
Can you have Kacie add her flight info onto her account if you dont mind
Another question, for transportation from the airport to resort, will my group be in one bus or 3 separate?
depends what your flight arrival times are!
if you all land at the same time, youll be on the same bus
yoo! Any update on Kacie? still need her flight info
Im sorry I just asked her to do it. She's never on her phone
thats a good thing tho! but thank you
yoyo! just emailed everyone the info on where to find our transportation service when you land
did y'all want to add any party pass tickets or do the booze cruise event with us?
What's up, let me talk to my group about the booze cruise and i'll lyk
aight bet yea just lmk. booze cruise is def lit
Is this the page where we see our vouchers
yessir. those will be available soon
Where would we pay the fees for the beach party's?
For the party pass add ons? I can add it right to your accounts and you'll be able to pay it there
for those special events, while you redeem your tickets on site with our staff id where you pay the upgrade fee
the $10 and $15 upgrades you see in the screenshots
Yo Spiff, are these charges in cash? And is the $10 per night per room, per person?
Yoyo can be either or but I would bring cash
Okay and is the $10 and $17 per person or just per room
Hey spiff, we're wondering if you can do a package for us for booze cruise and one day for coco bongo on Thursday
Whats good bro. since youre on resort already just head down to the hospitality desk with the Go Blue Tours staff and theyll be able to help you purchase those
